verse_text: Then we who are alive and remain shall be caught up together with them in the clouds to meet the Lord in the air. And thus we shall always be with the Lord.

pericope.title: Who Will Participate in Christ's Return

links.context: The Scriptures describe the end times in a variety of ways, so that no precise chronology can be determined (see Dan 7-12; Mk 13; Lk 21; [[1CO.15:51]]-55; [[1TH.4:13]]-17; [[2TH.2:1]]-10; and the Book of Revelation). The Lord's emphasis is on watchfulness and the practice of virtue rather than on constructing timetables of things that have not yet happened. In Matthew's account here, the end is described as encompassing (1) the initial sorrows (vv. 4-14), (2) the great tribulation (vv. 15-28), and (3) the coming of the Son of Man (vv. 29-31). The period of the great tribulation includes the entire Christian era and is not limited to the final years before Christ's return.
